{{Quote|Just watch out for Hap, he owns the Mistress and is a real vengeful cuss.|[[Droz]]|<ref name="SWG:ItSP">{{SWGcite|exp=JtL|type=space|Inspect the Shifty Prince|Dantooine system}}</ref>}}
'''Hap Daniel''' was the owner of the [[YKL-37R Nova Courier]] [[Light freighter/Legends|light]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Lord's Mistress]]''. According to the [[Droz|station master]] of the [[Dantooine Space Station]], he was "a real vengeful cuss."

==Biography==
{{Quote|There is a ship in Tatooine called the Lord's Mistress. She is loaded with Corellian Brandy and I want some.|Droz|<ref name="SWG:ItSP" />}}
In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline" /> Daniel's freighter ''Lord's Mistress'' was boarded by a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] in the [[Tatoo system/Legends|Tatooine system]], and its load of [[Corellian brandy/Legends|Corellian brandy]] was stolen.<ref name="SWG:ItLM">{{SWGcite|exp=JtL|type=space|Inspect the Lord's Mistress|Tatoo system}}</ref> When Daniel learned of the theft, he tried to take his revenge on the spacer. He managed to track him to the [[Dantooine system/Legends|Dantooine system]] and intercepted the ship when it returned to the Dantooine Space Station to deliver the brandy. When the station master realized that Daniel would find out about his involvement in the theft, he ordered the spacer to eliminate him. It came to a dogfight between the spacer and Daniel in his [[Ixiyen-class fast attack craft|''Ixiyen''-class fast attack craft]] that ended when Daniel's ship was shot down.<ref name="SWG:DtLM" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:TemplateCivilian.png|250px|thumb|Possible depictions of Hap Daniel]]
Hap Daniel appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:DtLM" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Hap Daniel was added to the game with the release of the expansion pack [[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed|''Jump to Lightspeed'']] on [[October 27]], [[2004]].<ref name="SWG:DtLM" />
